title: Garden Route Fashion & Creative at George Museum
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route Fashion and...
bodyText:
Gallery

GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route Fashion and Creative Exhibition is taking place at the Sayers Auditorium in the George Museum today, Thursday 23 and tomorrow, Friday 24 October from 09:00 to 16:00.


> Hosted by Reflekt Model Management in collaboration with the Elizabeth Galloway Academy of Fashion and the George Municipality, the event promises a vibrant showcase of fashion, photography, and art.


Visitors are welcome and can look forward to an inspiring blend of creativity and innovation, highlighting the talent and diversity of the local fashion and art scene.

Some of the fashion on display.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
